field.label: Interface
field.help: The interface to relay DHCP requests from.

field.label: Destination
field.help: The destination server group to relay DHCP requests to.

field.label: Agent Information
field.help: Add the relay agent information option.

field.label: Circuit id
field.help: Choose which value should be sent as the relay agent circuit ID.

field.label: Remote id
field.help: Choose which value should be sent as the relay agent remote ID.

field.label: Depend on (CARP)
field.help: The CARP VHID to depend on. When this virtual address is not in master state, then the instance will be shutdown.
